title: Post Sample Index PCR Size Selection using SPRIselect
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This is the fourth of four...
steps.instruction: This is the fourth of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup. This is the second of two cleanups.

steps.title: 100 uL of SPRI beads are added to the samples
steps.instruction: 100 uL of SPRI beads are added to the samples

steps.title: The samples and beads are mixed
steps.instruction: The samples and beads are mixed

steps.title: The beads are left to incubate...
steps.instruction: The beads are left to incubate for 5 minutes on the samples

steps.title: Magnetic module is engaged for 5...
steps.instruction: Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate the beads before removing the resulting supernatant

steps.title: Beads are washed twice with 200...
steps.instruction: Beads are washed twice with 200 uL of ethanol, disposing of ethanol each time

steps.title: 41 uL of elution solution is...
steps.instruction: 41 uL of elution solution is added to the samples and mixed

steps.title: Samples are left to elute for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Samples are left to elute for 2 minutes

steps.title: Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate beads
steps.instruction: Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate beads

steps.title: 40 uL of now eluted sample...
steps.instruction: 40 uL of now eluted sample is transferred to column 4 on the 96 well plate
